name: vizmatic
description: Create polished theme-aware diagrams, figures, dashboards, presentation frames, and animated GIFs with Vizmatic.

interface.longDescription: Use Vizmatic scene primitives to create and render diagrams, dashboards, figures, presentation frames, and animated GIFs from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use @vizmatic to create a polished architecture diagram and render dark/light PNG assets.
Use $vizmatic to turn this workflow into a theme-aware docs figure.
